mapper.select: SELECT id, requester_id, addressee_id, status, blocker_id FROM friendships WHERE LEAST(requester_id, addressee_id) = LEAST(#{userA}, #{userB}) AND GREATEST(requester_id, addressee_id) = GREATEST(#{userA}, #{userB})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships (requester_id, addressee_id, status, blocker_id, responded_at) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{addresseeId}, #{status}, #{blockerId}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PENDING' THEN NULL ELSE now() END) RETURNING id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friendships WHERE LEAST(requester_id, addressee_id) = LEAST(#{userA}, #{userB}) AND GREATEST(requester_id, addressee_id) = GREATEST(#{userA}, #{userB})
mapper.update: UPDATE friendships SET status = 'BLOCKED', blocker_id = #{blockerId}, responded_at = now() WHERE LEAST(requester_id, addressee_id) = LEAST(#{blockerId}, #{otherId}) AND GREATEST(requester_id, addressee_id) = GREATEST(#{blockerId}, #{otherId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.uuid::text AS user_uuid, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, CASE WHEN f.status = 'ACCEPTED' THEN 'FRIEND' WHEN f.status = 'BLOCKED' THEN 'BLOCKED' WHEN f.status = 'PENDING' AND f.requester_id = #{viewerId} THEN 'REQUESTED' WHEN f.status = 'PENDING' THEN 'INCOMING' ELSE 'NONE' END AS relation FROM users u LEFT JOIN friendships f ON LEAST(f.requester_id, f.addressee_id) = LEAST(u.id, #{viewerId}) AND GREATEST(f.requester_id, f.addressee_id) = GREATEST(u.id, #{viewerId}) WHERE u.id <> #{viewerId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND (u.friend_code = upper(#{query}) OR u.nickname ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%') ORDER BY (u.friend_code = upper(#{query})) DESC, u.nickname LIMIT #{limit}
